entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: আমরা এই site-এ amended terms post করে যেকোনো সময় Terms amend করতে পারি। এই Terms periodically review করা আপনার responsibility। revised Terms post করার পরে Platform-এর continued use মানে আপনি changes accept এবং agree করেছেন। আপনি এই page frequently check করবেন বলে expected, যাতে changes সম্পর্কে aware থাকেন, কারণ সেগুলো আপনার ওপর binding। কোনো revisions effective হওয়ার পরে আমাদের Service access বা use continue করলে, revised terms দ্বারা bound হতে আপনি agree করেন। new terms-এ agree না করলে, আপনি আর Service use করার authorized নন।

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: আমরা collect করি বা আপনি provide করেন এমন personal information disclose করতে পারি: Law Enforcement-এর জন্য Disclosure: certain circumstances-এ law দ্বারা required হলে বা public authorities-এর valid requests-এর response-এ আপনার Data disclose করতে আমাদের required হতে পারে। Business Transaction: আমাদের subsidiaries বা আমরা merger, acquisition বা asset sale-এ involved হলে আপনার Personal Data transferred হতে পারে। Other cases. আমরা আপনার information disclose করতে পারি: আমাদের subsidiaries এবং affiliates-কে; contractors, service providers, এবং আমাদের business support করতে ব্যবহৃত other third parties-কে; আপনি যে purpose-এ provide করেন তা fulfil করতে; আমাদের website-এ আপনার company’s logo include করতে; information provide করার সময় আমাদের disclosed any other purpose-এ; আপনার consent সহ any other cases-এ; যদি আমরা believe করি Company, our customers, বা others-এর rights, property, বা safety protect করতে disclosure necessary বা appropriate।

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: আমাদের Service facilitate করতে (“Service Providers”), আমাদের behalf-এ Service provide করতে, Service-related services perform করতে বা আমাদের Service কীভাবে used হয় analyze করতে help করার জন্য আমরা third party companies এবং individuals employ করতে পারি। এই third parties শুধু আমাদের behalf-এ tasks perform করতে আপনার Personal Data access করে এবং কোনো other purpose-এর জন্য disclose বা use না করতে obligated।

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: আমরা Service-এর মধ্যে paid products এবং/অথবা services provide করতে পারি। সে ক্ষেত্রে payment processing-এর জন্য third-party services (যেমন payment processors) use করি। আমরা আপনার payment card details store বা collect করব না। সেই information সরাসরি আমাদের third-party payment processors-কে provided হয়, যাদের আপনার personal information use তাদের Privacy Policy দ্বারা governed। এই payment processors PCI Security Standards Council managed PCI-DSS standards adhere করে, যা Visa, Mastercard, American Express এবং Discover-এর মতো brands-এর joint effort। PCI-DSS requirements payment information-এর secure handling ensure করতে help করে।

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: আমরা আমাদের sole discretion-এ, কোনো reason whatsoever এবং limitation ছাড়া, including but not limited to Terms breach, prior notice বা liability ছাড়া immediately আপনার account terminate বা suspend এবং Service access bar করতে পারি। আপনি account terminate করতে চাইলে simply Service use discontinue করতে পারেন। Terms-এর যেসব provisions nature অনুযায়ী termination-এর পর survive করা উচিত, সেগুলো survive করবে, including without limitation ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity এবং limitations of liability।

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: আমরা time to time আমাদের Privacy Policy update করতে পারি। নতুন Privacy Policy এই page-এ post করে আমরা changes notify করব। change effective হওয়ার আগে email এবং/অথবা আমাদের Service-এ prominent notice দিয়ে জানাব এবং এই Privacy Policy-এর top-এ “effective date” update করব। changes-এর জন্য এই Privacy Policy periodically review করার advice দেওয়া হচ্ছে। এই Privacy Policy-এর changes এই page-এ post হলে effective হয়।

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: আপনি আমাদের Service visit করার পরে third party websites-এ আপনাকে advertise করতে আমরা remarketing services use করতে পারি। আমরা এবং আমাদের third-party vendors আপনার past visits to our Service-এর ভিত্তিতে ads inform, optimise এবং serve করতে cookies use করি।

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: আমাদের Service-এর development process automate করতে আমরা third-party Service Providers use করতে পারি।

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: আমাদের Service-এর use monitor এবং analyze করতে আমরা third-party Service Providers use করতে পারি।

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: আমাদের Service support এবং maintain করতে help করার জন্য আপনাকে advertisements show করতে আমরা third-party Service Providers use করতে পারি।

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: আমরা আমাদের sole discretion-এ notice ছাড়া আমাদের Service এবং Service-এর মাধ্যমে provide করা any service বা material withdraw বা amend করার right reserve করি। কোনো reason-এ Service-এর all বা any part কোনো সময় বা period unavailable হলে আমরা liable হব না। time to time, registered users including users-এর জন্য Service-এর কিছু parts বা entire Service access restrict করতে পারি।

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: আমরা others-এর intellectual property rights respect করি। Service-এ posted Content কোনো person বা entity-এর copyright বা other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) infringe করে এমন claim-এর response দেওয়া আমাদের policy। আপনি copyright owner বা owner-এর behalf-এ authorized হলে, এবং copyrighted work এমনভাবে copied হয়েছে বলে believe করলে যা copyright infringement constitute করে, আপনার claim support@inspir.app-এ email করে submit করুন, subject line: “Copyright Infringement” এবং নিচে “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims”-এর অধীনে detailed alleged Infringement description include করুন। Service-এ এবং/অথবা Service-এর মাধ্যমে found কোনো Content-এর infringement সম্পর্কে misrepresentation বা bad-faith claims-এর জন্য damages (including costs এবং attorneys’ fees)-এর accountable হতে পারেন।

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: আমরা আমাদের Service-এর activity track করতে cookies এবং similar tracking technologies use করি এবং certain information hold করি। Cookies হলো small amount of data-সহ files, যাতে anonymous unique identifier থাকতে পারে। Cookies website থেকে আপনার browser-এ sent হয় এবং আপনার device-এ stored হয়। information collect এবং track করতে এবং আমাদের Service improve ও analyze করতে beacons, tags এবং scripts-এর মতো other tracking technologies-ও used হয়। আপনি browser-কে all cookies refuse করতে বা cookie sent হলে indicate করতে instruct করতে পারেন। তবে cookies accept না করলে, আমাদের Service-এর কিছু portions use করতে নাও পারেন। আমরা যে Cookies use করি তার examples: Session Cookies: আমাদের Service operate করতে Session Cookies use করি। Preference Cookies: আপনার preferences এবং various settings remember করতে Preference Cookies use করি। Security Cookies: security purposes-এর জন্য Security Cookies use করি। Advertising Cookies: আপনার এবং আপনার interests-এর সঙ্গে relevant advertisements serve করতে Advertising Cookies use করা হয়।

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: আমরা আমাদের planet-এর বাইরে গিয়েছি। তবে সবচেয়ে rapid এবং significant advancement ছিল communication এবং technology-তে, যা ৩ billion-এর বেশি global population connect করেছে।

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: এই Privacy Policy-তে set out purposes-এর জন্য necessary যতদিন, আমরা শুধু ততদিন আপনার Personal Data retain করব। legal obligations comply করতে necessary extent-এ (যেমন applicable laws comply করতে data retain required হলে), disputes resolve করতে, এবং legal agreements ও policies enforce করতে আমরা আপনার Personal Data retain এবং use করব। internal analysis purposes-এর জন্য Usage Data-ও retain করব। Usage Data generally shorter period retain করা হয়, except যখন এই data security strengthen করতে বা আমাদের Service-এর functionality improve করতে used হয়, অথবা আমরা legally obligated longer time periods-এর জন্য এই data retain করতে।

You acknowledge that you have read and understood the Agreements, and agree to be bound of them. If you do not agree with (or cannot comply with) Agreements, then you may not use the Service, but please let us know by emailing support@inspir.appso we can try to find a solution. entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: আপনি আমাদের সঙ্গে account create করলে, আপনি guarantee করেন যে provided information সব সময় accurate, complete, এবং current। inaccurate, incomplete, বা obsolete information Service-এ আপনার account immediate termination ঘটাতে পারে। আপনার account এবং password-এর confidentiality maintain করার জন্য আপনি responsible, including but not limited to আপনার computer এবং/অথবা account access restriction। আপনার account এবং/অথবা password-এর অধীনে ঘটে এমন any and all activities বা actions-এর responsibility accept করতে আপনি agree করেন, password আমাদের Service বা third-party service-এ থাকুক। security breach বা unauthorized use সম্পর্কে aware হওয়ার সঙ্গে সঙ্গে আমাদের notify করতে হবে। appropriate authorization ছাড়া আপনি অন্য person বা entity-এর name, lawfully available নয় এমন name, বা আপনার ছাড়া অন্য person/entity-এর rights subject এমন name বা trademark username হিসেবে use করতে পারবেন না। offensive, vulgar বা obscene কোনো name username হিসেবে use করতে পারবেন না। আমরা sole discretion-এ service refuse, accounts terminate, content remove বা edit, অথবা orders cancel করার right reserve করি।

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: AI-তে notes paste করলে, broad ideas-কে এই jobs-এ split করতে বলুন। ১৮টি specific cards-এর deck সাধারণত ৫টি giant cards-এর deck-এর চেয়ে ভালো, যেখানে প্রতিটিতে whole paragraph থাকে।

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: আমাদের Service use করার সময়, আমরা নিম্নলিখিত information-ও collect করতে পারি: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, place of residence-এ registration এবং actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), education documents-এর details, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, bonuses এবং compensation information, marital status information, family members, social security (বা other taxpayer identification) number, office location এবং other data। Payment Data। আপনি purchases করলে payment process করতে necessary data collect করতে পারি, যেমন আপনার payment instrument number (যেমন credit card number), এবং payment instrument-associated security code। সব payment data Razorpay stored করে। তাদের privacy notice link(s) এখানে পেতে পারেন: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: আমাদের Service use করার সময়, contact বা identify করতে ব্যবহৃত হতে পারে এমন certain personally identifiable information (“Personal Data”) provide করতে আমরা আপনাকে ask করতে পারি। personally identifiable information include করতে পারে, but is not limited to: Student এবং Parent-এর Email address, Student এবং Parent-এর First name এবং last name, Student এবং Parent-এর Phone number, Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City, School name, Class, Cookies এবং Usage Data। newsletters, marketing বা promotional materials এবং আপনার interest হতে পারে এমন other information দিয়ে contact করতে আমরা আপনার Data use করতে পারি। unsubscribe link follow করে আপনি এই communications-এর যেকোনো বা সব receive করা থেকে opt-out করতে পারেন। Usage Data, আপনি আমাদের Service visit করলে বা any device দ্বারা/by Service access করলে আপনার browser যে information sends করে তা আমরা collect করতে পারি (“Usage Data”)। এই Usage Data-তে আপনার computer-এর Internet Protocol address (যেমন IP address), browser type, browser version, আপনি visit করা Service pages, visit-এর time and date, সেই pages-এ spent time, unique device identifiers এবং other diagnostic data include হতে পারে। device দিয়ে Service access করলে, এই Usage Data-তে আপনি যে device type use করেন, আপনার device unique ID, আপনার device IP address, device operating system, Internet browser type, unique device identifiers এবং other diagnostic data include হতে পারে।

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: World History সব সময় যেন picture থেকে zooming out-এর মতো হয়েছে, এমন picture যা বদলাতেই থাকে। 19th century-এর leading centuries human history-তে turning point mark করেছে, কারণ world flat, limited view থেকে new territories এবং colonies-এর growing understanding-এর দিকে move করেছে। French Revolution প্রথমবার large population protest করতে এবং liberty, equality, fraternity-এর ideals establish করতে gathered হয়েছিল। World War II-এর events-ও পরের century-এর জন্য world shape করেছে এবং 21st century-এর foundation laid করেছে।

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ, কিন্তু recommended workflow hint-first। final answer copy করার বদলে method understand করতে, আপনার work check করতে, এবং errors review করতে এটি use করুন।

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ, যখন এটি ইঙ্গিত দেয়, reasoning যাচাই করে, ভুল ব্যাখ্যা করে এবং আপনার হয়ে না লিখে আপনাকেই final answer তৈরি করতে বলে।

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। {value1} {value2}-এ public guest learning mode হিসেবে opens, তাই account create করার আগে কয়েকটি free guest messages দিয়ে start করতে পারেন।

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। good workflow হলো trusted lesson source থেকে foundation learn করা, তারপর follow-up questions ask, recall practise, misconceptions repair, এবং next কী review করবেন plan করতে inspir use করা।

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। school public modes test করে begin করতে পারে, তারপর use case, content needs, এবং funding path clear হলে pilot বা tailored deployment-এর দিকে move করতে পারে।

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Audience pages শুধু public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, এবং AI-readable discovery files-এ link করে। Private saved chats excluded থাকে।

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Category pages public guest modes, learning paths, এবং article clusters-এ link করে, যাতে learners reading থেকে tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, বা feedback-এ move করতে পারে।

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Code Tutor concepts explain করতে, examples walk through করতে, behavior predict করতে জিজ্ঞাসা করতে, এবং learning-কে copy-paste-এ না বদলে practice করতে সাহায্য করতে পারে।

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Exam Prep Planner আপনার topics, date, এবং available time-কে practice এবং review-সহ practical revision sequence-এ বদলাতে পারে।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। custom deployment discuss করার আগে Public guest modes teachers-কে learning behavior test করতে দেয়।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, এবং writing feedback-এর মতো Public guest modes directly open হয়।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, এবং flashcards-এর মতো Public guest modes canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs থেকে directly open হয়।

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Public mode URLs guest mode-এ directly open হয়, যাতে learner immediately start করতে পারে, তারপর saved history বা more usage চাইলে পরে account create করতে পারে।

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Public modes school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, এবং personal study routines-এর জন্য work করে।

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quiz এবং flashcard-এর মতো public topic chat সরাসরি guest mode-এ খোলে।

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। /chat/learn-anything এবং /chat/socratic-instruction-এর মতো Public topic entrypoints indexable learning pages হিসেবে intended।

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Quiz, Flashcard Builder, এবং Spaced Review active recall এবং mistake repair-এর জন্য designed public modes।

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: হ্যাঁ। Reading Companion passages simplify করতে, questions ask করতে, vocabulary explain করতে, এবং main claim ও supporting evidence identify করতে help করতে পারে।
